name: nes-tetris-trainer
description: A public, multi-user web app that serves pre-generated **2-ply NES Tetris placement puzzles** and tracks each player's stacking skill with a **Glicko co-rating**. The goal is to train *stacking judgment* — where to put each piece — independent of execution speed.

scripts.test: echo "(placeholder) no tests configured yet — replace with your test runner (e.g. vitest) in issue #1" && exit 0
scripts.typecheck: echo "(placeholder) no typecheck configured yet — replace with: tsc --noEmit in issue #1" && exit 0
